mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_program_match_result(user_id, program_id, match_score, match_tier, reason_tags_json) VALUES(#{userId}, #{programId}, #{matchScore}, #{matchTier}, #{reasonTagsJson}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE match_score = VALUES(match_score), match_tier = VALUES(match_tier), reason_tags_json = VALUES(reason_tags_json), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
